# GitHub Actions workflows

Workflows are currently **disabled** (renamed to `.yml.bak`) due to billing. No jobs run until re-enabled.

**To re-enable after fixing billing:**

- Rename `ci.yml.bak` → `ci.yml`
- Rename `publish.yml.bak` → `publish.yml`

GitHub only runs files ending in `.yml` or `.yaml`, so the `.bak` files are ignored.
